Nullable for backwards compat with rows that pre-date\n  // this column.\n  lineManagerId String?\n  lineManager   LineManager?   @relation(fields: [lineManagerId], references: [id])\n  createdAt     DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime       @updatedAt\n  leaveRequests LeaveRequest[]\n  balances      LeaveBalance[]\n\n  @@index([firstName])\n  @@index([slackUserId])\n  @@index([lineManagerId])\n}\n\nmodel LineManager {\n  id            String         @id @default(uuid())\n  name          String\n  email         String?\n  slackUserId   String?\n  slackHandle   String?\n  isActive      Boolean        @default(true)\n  createdAt     DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime       @updatedAt\n  leaveRequests LeaveRequest[]\n  directReports Employee[]\n\n  @@index([slackUserId])\n}\n\nmodel LeaveRequest {\n  id                  String      @id @default(uuid())\n  employeeId          String\n  employee            Employee    @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id])\n  lineManagerId       String\n  lineManager         LineManager @relation(fields: [lineManagerId], references: [id])\n  department          String?\n  leaveType           String // Annual Leave, Sick Leave, etc.\n  startDate           DateTime\n  endDate             DateTime\n  totalDays           Int\n  reason              String?\n  // Status: pending_manager, pending_hr, approved, rejected_manager, rejected_hr, blocked_balance\n  status              String      @default(\"pending_manager\")\n  // Employee signature (typed name at submission)\n  employeeSignature   String\n  employeeSignedAt    DateTime    @default(now())\n  // Manager stage\n  managerDecision     String? // \"Immediately available\" | \"Less than 1 month\" | \"1 month\" | \"2 months\" | \"3 months\" | \"More than 3 months\"\n  office             String? // \"Dubai\" | \"Singapore\"\n  source             String? // \"agency\" | \"career_page\" | \"direct\" | \"referral\"\n  agencyName         String? // populated when source=\"agency\"\n  linkedinUrl        String?\n  cvDriveUrl         String? // patched in by n8n drive-callback\n  cvDriveFolderUrl   String?\n  cvFileName         String?\n  cvUploadedAt       DateTime?\n  // Phase 1.B v3 — extended candidate intake fields\n  currentlyEmployed  String? // \"employed\" | \"not_working\" | \"freelancing\"\n  visaStatus         String? // free text — varies (UAE Resident, Tourist, Employment-Sponsored, Golden, etc.)\n  aiToolsProficiency String? // free text — which AI tools the candidate uses\n  hasDriversLicense  Boolean? // null = unknown, true/false otherwise\n  locationStatus     String? // \"in_uae\" | \"outside_uae\"\n  externalId         String?           @unique\n  archivedAt         DateTime?\n  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt\n  applications       Application[]\n  invites            CandidateInvite[]\n\n  @@index([email])\n  @@index([office])\n  @@index([archivedAt])\n  @@index([source])\n}\n\nmodel Application {\n  id                 String                @id @default(uuid())\n  candidateId        String\n  candidate          Candidate             @relation(fields: [candidateId], references: [id])\n  jobRoleId          String\n  jobRole            JobRole               @relation(fields: [jobRoleId], references: [id])\n  intakeSubmissionId String? // FormSubmission.id that created it\n  office             String? // snapshot at apply time\n  source             String? // snapshot at apply time\n  agencyName         String? // snapshot at apply time\n  // Pipeline stages: intake_received → cv_review → pre_scored →\n  //   interview_invited → interview_scheduled → interview_completed →\n  //   post_scored → offer → hired | rejected | withdrawn\n  currentStage       String                @default(\"intake_received\")\n  status             String                @default(\"active\") // active | closed_hired | closed_rejected | closed_withdrawn\n  closeReason        String?\n  assignedAdminId    String? // AdminUser.id of owner\n  preScore           Float? // 0..1 (Phase 1.B)\n  preScoreTier       String? // strong_match | match | consider | weak | reject\n  postScore          Float? // 0..1 (Phase 1.C)\n  postScoreTier      String?\n  appliedAt          DateTime              @default(now())\n  // When the agency / submitter actually delivered the CV. Distinct from\n  // appliedAt (= row creation time) so admins can backdate to the real receipt.\n  cvReceivedAt       DateTime?\n  closedAt           DateTime?\n  externalId         String?               @unique\n  createdAt          DateTime              @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime              @updatedAt\n  stages             ApplicationStage[]\n  feedback           ApplicationFeedback[]\n  scores             ApplicationScore[]\n  invites            CandidateInvite[]\n  interviews         Interview[]\n\n  @@index([candidateId])\n  @@index([jobRoleId])\n  @@index([currentStage])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([office])\n  @@index([source])\n}\n\nmodel ApplicationStage {\n  id            String      @id @default(uuid())\n  applicationId String\n  application   Application @relation(fields: [applicationId], references: [id])\n  stage         String\n  enteredAt     DateTime    @default(now())\n  exitedAt      DateTime?\n  notes         String?\n  actorId       String? // AdminUser.id of who moved it (null = system/agent)\n  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())\n\n  @@index([applicationId])\n}\n\nmodel ApplicationFeedback {\n  id            String      @id @default(uuid())\n  applicationId String\n  application   Application @relation(fields: [applicationId], references: [id])\n  actorId       String // AdminUser.id\n  kind          String // \"interview_feedback\" | \"note\" | \"manual_score\"\n  content       String\n  score         Int? // 1..5 (when kind=\"manual_score\")\n  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())\n\n  @@index([applicationId])\n}\n\nmodel RecruitmentRubric {\n  id                String             @id @default(uuid())\n  name              String\n  kind              String // \"pre_interview\" | \"post_interview\"\n  jobRoleId         String? // null = global default; set = role-specific override\n  jobRole           JobRole?           @relation(fields: [jobRoleId], references: [id])\n  version           Int                @default(1)\n  isActive          Boolean            @default(true)\n  // JSON: [{ key, label, weight, scoringPrompt }]\n  criteria          String\n  thresholdStrong   Float              @default(0.85)\n  thresholdMatch    Float              @default(0.70)\n  thresholdConsider Float              @default(0.55)\n  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime           @updatedAt\n  scores            ApplicationScore[]\n\n  @@index([kind, jobRoleId, isActive])\n}\n\nmodel ApplicationScore {\n  id            String            @id @default(uuid())\n  applicationId String\n  application   Application       @relation(fields: [applicationId], references: [id])\n  rubricId      String\n  rubric        RecruitmentRubric @relation(fields: [rubricId], references: [id])\n  kind          String // \"pre_interview\" | \"post_interview\"\n  score         Float // 0..1\n  tier          String // strong_match | match | consider | weak | reject\n  breakdown     String // JSON: [{criterionKey, score, reasoning}, ...]\n  sourceRef     String? // CV filename, Fireflies transcript ID, etc.\n  computedBy    String? // \"claude\" | \"manual\"\n  computedAt    DateTime          @default(now())\n\n  @@index([applicationId])\n  @@index([rubricId])\n}\n\n// ─── Phase 1.D: Interview Scheduling ─────────────────────────\n\n// Refresh tokens for Google Workspace OAuth (interview@janusd.com mailbox).\n// One row per email/scope set. Refresh tokens are long-lived; access tokens\n// are minted on demand via google-calendar.ts.\nmodel GoogleToken {\n  id            String    @id @default(uuid())\n  email         String    @unique // e.g. \"interview@janusd.com\"\n  refreshToken  String // long-lived, opaque\n  scopes        String // CSV of OAuth scopes granted\n  lastRefreshAt DateTime?\n  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt\n}\n\n// A scheduled interview between a candidate and an interviewer. One Application\n// can have multiple interviews (initial screen, technical, final). Created by\n// HR via the Slack Block Kit modal that pops off the pre-score message.\nmodel Interview {\n  id                     String      @id @default(uuid())\n  applicationId          String\n  application            Application @relation(fields: [applicationId], references: [id])\n  scheduledAt            DateTime // start time, UTC\n  durationMin            Int         @default(60)\n  timezone               String      @default(\"Asia/Dubai\")\n  interviewerEmail       String\n  interviewerName        String? // snapshot for invite + emails\n  candidateEmail         String // snapshot from Candidate.email at booking time\n  meetUrl                String? // Google Meet link (from Calendar API)\n  calendarEventId        String? // Google Calendar event ID for cancel/update\n  calendarHtmlLink       String? // user-visible calendar URL\n  status                 String      @default(\"scheduled\") // scheduled | cancelled | completed | no_show\n  scheduledBySlackUserId String? // who clicked submit in Slack\n  cancellationReason     String?\n  cancelledAt            DateTime?\n  createdAt              DateTime    @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime    @updatedAt\n\n  @@index([applicationId])\n  @@index([scheduledAt])\n  @@index([interviewerEmail])\n  @@index([status])\n}\n",
  "runtimeDataModel": {
    "models": {},
    "enums": {},
    "types": {}
  },
  "parameterizationSchema": {
    "strings": [],
    "graph": ""
  }
}

async function decodeBase64AsWasm(wasmBase64: string): Promise<WebAssembly.Module> {
  const { Buffer } = await import('node:buffer')
  const wasmArray = Buffer.from(wasmBase64, 'base64')
  return new WebAssembly.Module(wasmArray)
}

config.compilerWasm = {
  getRuntime: async () => await import("@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_fast_bg.sqlite.mjs"),

  getQueryCompilerWasmModule: async () => {
    const { wasm } = await import("@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_fast_bg.sqlite.wasm-base64.mjs")
    return await decodeBase64AsWasm(wasm)
  },

  importName: "./query_compiler_fast_bg.js"
}



export type LogOptions<ClientOptions extends Prisma.PrismaClientOptions> =
  'log' extends keyof ClientOptions ? ClientOptions['log'] extends Array<Prisma.LogLevel | Prisma.LogDefinition> ? Prisma.GetEvents<ClientOptions['log']> : never : never

export interface PrismaClientConstructor {
    /**
   * ## Prisma Client
   * 
   * Type-safe database client for TypeScript
   * @example
   * ```
   * const prisma = new PrismaClient({
   *   adapter: new PrismaPg({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })
   * })
   * // Fetch zero or more Departments
   * const departments = await prisma.department.findMany()
   * ```
   * 
   * Read more in our [docs](https://pris.ly/d/client).
   */

  new <
    Options extends Prisma.PrismaClientOptions = Prisma.PrismaClientOptions,
    LogOpts extends LogOptions<Options> = LogOptions<Options>,
    OmitOpts extends Prisma.PrismaClientOptions['omit'] = Options extends { omit: infer U } ? U : Prisma.PrismaClientOptions['omit'],
    ExtArgs extends runtime.Types.Extensions.InternalArgs = runtime.Types.Extensions.DefaultArgs
  >(options: Prisma.Subset<Options, Prisma.PrismaClientOptions> ): PrismaClient<LogOpts, OmitOpts, ExtArgs>
}

/**
 * ## Prisma Client
 * 
 * Type-safe database client for TypeScript
 * @example
 * ```
 * const prisma = new PrismaClient({
 *   adapter: new PrismaPg({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })
 * })
 * // Fetch zero or more Departments
 * const departments = await prisma.department.findMany()
 * ```
 * 
 * Read more in our [docs](https://pris.ly/d/client).
 */

export interface PrismaClient<
  in LogOpts extends Prisma.LogLevel = never,
  in out OmitOpts extends Prisma.PrismaClientOptions['omit'] = undefined,
  in out ExtArgs extends runtime.Types.Extensions.InternalArgs = runtime.Types.Extensions.DefaultArgs
> {
  [K: symbol]: { types: Prisma.TypeMap<ExtArgs>['other'] }

  $on<V extends LogOpts>(eventType: V, callback: (event: V extends 'query' ? Prisma.QueryEvent : Prisma.LogEvent) => void): PrismaClient;

  /**
   * Connect with the database
   */
  $connect(): runtime.Types.Utils.JsPromise<void>;

  /**
   * Disconnect from the database
   */
  $disconnect(): runtime.Types.Utils.JsPromise<void>;

/**
   * Executes a prepared raw query and returns the number of affected rows.
   * @example
   * ```
   * const result = await prisma.$executeRaw`UPDATE User SET cool = ${true} WHERE email = ${'user@email.com'};`
   * ```
   *
   * Read more in our [docs](https://pris.ly/d/raw-queries).
   */
  $executeRaw<T = unknown>(query: TemplateStringsArray | Prisma.Sql, ...values: any[]): Prisma.PrismaPromise<number>;
